_meta.title: WI-007 EP01 컨셉아트 생성 (현실세계 정원 + 미시세계 프리즘)
_meta.description: EP01 '물방울 속 우주'의 핵심 컨셉아트 2종을 생성하는 ComfyUI API 워크플로우. 현실세계 정원(16:9 수채화) + 미시세계 프리즘 내부(16:9 초현실).

masterpiece, best quality, surreal microscopic universe art, concept art, key visual,
inside a water droplet — a vast prismatic world of refracted light and molecular structures,
transparent curved water walls forming a dome-like interior space with rainbow light refracting through every surface,
ground made of interlocking water molecule chains: large blue-tinted transparent spheres (oxygen atoms) connected to small white translucent spheres (hydrogen atoms) in scientifically accurate H2O structure,
towering crystalline light pillars rising from the molecular floor, each pillar splitting white light into full rainbow spectrum,
floating prismatic particles and light motes drifting through the air like snow,
a rainbow prismatic light path winding through the scene leading into the distance,
a tiny 7-year-old girl (far away, small figure) walking alongside a cute round tardigrade creature on the rainbow path,
iridescent color palette: dominant transparent blues, prismatic rainbow caustics on every surface, warm golden light from above,
volumetric prismatic lighting, ethereal glow, bioluminescent ambient light from molecular floor,
scientific beauty: light refraction patterns, surface tension visualization, molecular bonds as visual architecture,
